Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I thought you were gonna go visit your mother's grave.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You sure this is where you wanna be?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Well, I was planning on visiting her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}But when I thought about what I was gonna say to her, it just didn't feel right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I've still got unfinished business to take care of first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I don't have anything to tell Shinji right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}An unbeatable enemy, huh... I wonder what it's like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}It doesn't matter, though. I've already made up my mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I don't care what I'm up against. I'm gonna look it straight in the eyes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}I like the sound of that. You can count me in, too![n]{f 1 1}
